task_completion.description: The dashboard is named 'ELB Burst Overage Tracking'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top of the Graphite dashboard interface displays the title 'ELB Burst Overage Tracking'.

task_completion.description: A graph titled 'Traffic vs Baseline' is created with the correct targets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph with the title 'Traffic vs Baseline' is visible. The target list or legend shows 'Actual Traffic' and 'Contracted Baseline' (or the underlying functions like constantLine(50)).

task_completion.description: A graph titled 'Instantaneous Burst Volume' is created with the correct target.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph with the title 'Instantaneous Burst Volume' is visible. The target list or legend shows 'Billable Burst Rate' (or the underlying maxSeries/offset functions).

task_completion.description: A graph titled 'Cumulative Billable Overage' is created with the correct target.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph with the title 'Cumulative Billable Overage' is visible. The target list or legend shows 'Cumulative Overage Units' (or the underlying integral function).
A 'Dashboard saved' confirmation message is visible, or the dashboard is shown in the list of saved dashboards, or the URL reflects the saved dashboard name.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Graphite web GUI to build the dashboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Graphite web interface being used (e.g., clicking menus, adding graphs, typing in target fields), rather than terminal commands or API calls.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by writing the dashboard JSON directly in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots of text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) open with dashboard JSON content.

integrity.description: The graphs render actual data lines.
integrity.visual_evidence: The graphs display plotted lines (e.g., a constant line at 50, fluctuating traffic lines, or cumulative curves), indicating the targets were successfully evaluated by the Graphite backend.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected dashboard name is exactly 'ELB Burst Overage Tracking'. The expected graph titles are exactly 'Traffic vs Baseline', 'Instantaneous Burst Volume', and 'Cumulative Billable Overage'. The task uses real AWS CloudWatch ELB request count data injected into Graphite.
